metadata.filed_by: Shri Vikas Singh, Senior Officer, ACB, Uttar Pradesh

content: I, Shri Vikas Singh, Senior Officer, Anti-Corruption Bureau, Uttar Pradesh, hereby file this First Information Report under Section 7 read with Section 13(1)(d) of the Prevention of Corruption Act, 1988. On 12.10.2023 at approximately 15:30 hours, a trap operation was conducted at the office of Ghaziabad Municipal Corporation, Rajiv Nagar, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, against one Mr. Ramesh Kumar, Junior Clerk (Grade-III), on the complaint of Mr. Arjun Mehta, a licensed building contractor. The complainant had earlier, on 10.10.2023, received a WhatsApp message from the accused demanding a bribe of ₹50,000 in cash for expediting his building permit application. The complainant, with the prior approval of the ACB, recorded the conversation and arranged a meeting on 12.10.2023. At the scheduled time, the complainant entered the accused’s office and handed over an envelope containing ₹50,000 in marked currency notes (serial numbers listed in ACB Annexure-A). Immediately upon receipt, the accused pocketed the envelope. ACB officers, stationed inside the office under cover, entered the room within 90 seconds and arrested the accused. The marked currency was recovered from his person. Two independent witnesses, Mrs. Priya Sharma and Mr. Sanjay Verma, were present during the operation and corroborated the transaction. The accused was produced before the ACB Magistrate on the same day. The case is being investigated under the Prevention of Corruption Act, 1988. No prior complaint was lodged by the complainant. This FIR is filed to initiate formal proceedings.
